```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\nfrom ..models import Job\r\n\r\n\r\nTaskFunc = Callable[[\"TaskContext\", BaseModel], Awaitable[Any]]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskDefinition:\r\n    name: str\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n    func: TaskFunc\r\n    max_attempts_default: int\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TaskContext:\r\n    job: Job\r\n    attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n    settings: Settings\r\n    logger: logging.Logger\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n\r\n\r\n_TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef register_task(\r\n    name: str,\r\n    *,\r\n    payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n    max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n    \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n        if name in _TASKS:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n        _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n            name=name,\r\n            payload_model=payload_model,\r\n            func=func,\r\n            max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n        )\r\n        return func\r\n\r\n    return decorator\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n    try:\r\n        return _TASKS[name]\r\n    except KeyError as exc:\r\n        raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n\r\n\r\ndef make_context(\r\n    *,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n    logger: logging.Logger,\r\n    check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n) -> TaskContext:\r\n    return TaskContext(\r\n        job=job,\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=session,\r\n        settings=get_settings(),\r\n        logger=logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "816730846364c0468302eec3ad6a8a6b8a319d9190c5b760aace52254cedea70",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom httpx import AsyncClient\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.api_app import create_app\r\nfrom miniqueue.config import get_settings\r\nfrom miniqueue.db import init_db\r\nfrom miniqueue.models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom miniqueue.scheduler import scheduler_loop, load_schedules\r\nfrom miniqueue.worker import ensure_group, worker_loop\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_delayed_job_not_before_run_at_and_scheduler_restart(tmp_path, monkeypatch) -> None:\r\n    # Configure DB and Redis URL for local dockerized Redis.\r\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"jobs.db\"\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_DB_URL\", f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{db_path}\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/0\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SEC\", \"1\")\r\n\r\n    app = create_app()\r\n    await init_db()\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n\r\n    # Start a single worker and a scheduler loop.\r\n    stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n\r\n    async def worker_task() -> None:\r\n        await worker_loop(0, queue=settings.queue_default, consumer_name=\"test-worker\")\r\n\r\n    from miniqueue.scheduler import load_schedules\r\n\r\n    # Use an empty schedule list so only delayed jobs are processed.\r\n    schedules = []\r\n\r\n    async def scheduler_task() -> None:\r\n        await scheduler_loop(schedules)\r\n\r\n    wt = asyncio.create_task(worker_task())\r\n    st = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_task())\r\n\r\n    async with AsyncClient(app=app, base_url=\"http://test\") as client:\r\n        run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=3)\r\n        body = {\r\n            \"type\": \"sleep\",\r\n            \"payload\": {\"seconds\": 0.1},\r\n            \"run_at\": run_at.isoformat(),\r\n        }\r\n        resp = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n        assert resp.status_code == 201\r\n        job_id = resp.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n        # Ensure job does not complete before run_at.\r\n        pre_deadline = run_at - timedelta(seconds=1)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < pre_deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            assert data[\"state\"] in {\"QUEUED\", \"RUNNING\"}\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n\r\n        # Wait until after run_at and ensure completion.\r\n        deadline = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=10)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            if data[\"state\"] == \"SUCCEEDED\":\r\n                break\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n        else:\r\n            pytest.fail(\"Job did not complete after run_at\")\r\n\r\n    # Cleanup tasks.\r\n    wt.cancel()\r\n    st.cancel()\r\n    await asyncio.gather(wt, st, return_exceptions=True)\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "153a718bd8cb605bafe68ec6d1a543a0bcd7495b909528c7365761d687092afd",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

5Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Bregister_task%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bname%253A%2Bstr%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%252A%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload_model%253A%2BType%255BBaseModel%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts_default%253A%2Bint%2B%253D%2B3%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BCallable%255B%255BTaskFunc%255D%252C%2BTaskFunc%255D%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Decorator%2Bto%2Bregister%2Ba%2Btask%2Bimplementation.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bdecorator%2528func%253A%2BTaskFunc%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BTaskFunc%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bname%2Bin%2B_TASKS%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%2BValueError%2528f%255C%2522Task%2B%257Bname%2521r%257D%2Balready%2Bregistered%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B_TASKS%255Bname%255D%2B%253D%2BTaskDefinition%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bname%253Dname%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload_model%253Dpayload_model%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bfunc%253Dfunc%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts_default%253Dmax_attempts_default%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bfunc%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bdecorator%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Bget_task_definition%2528name%253A%2Bstr%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BTaskDefinition%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2B_TASKS%255Bname%255D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BKeyError%2Bas%2Bexc%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%2BKeyError%2528f%255C%2522Unknown%2Btask%2Btype%2B%257Bname%2521r%257D%255C%2522%2529%2Bfrom%2Bexc%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Bmake_context%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%252A%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob%253A%2BJob%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Battempt%253A%2Bint%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsession%253A%2BOptional%255BAsyncSession%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blogger%253A%2Blogging.Logger%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck_canceled%253A%2BCallable%255B%255B%255D%252C%2BAwaitable%255BNone%255D%255D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BTaskContext%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2BTaskContext%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob%253Djob%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Battempt%253Dattempt%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsession%253Dsession%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%253Dget_settings%2528%2529%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Blogger%253Dlogger%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcheck_canceled%253Dcheck_canceled%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522816730846364c0468302eec3ad6a8a6b8a319d9190c5b760aace52254cedea70%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Basyncio%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2Bdatetime%252C%2Btimedelta%252C%2Btimezone%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bhttpx%2Bimport%2BAsyncClient%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.api_app%2Bimport%2Bcreate_app%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.config%2Bimport%2Bget_settings%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.db%2Bimport%2Binit_db%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.models%2Bimport%2BJob%252C%2BJobState%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.scheduler%2Bimport%2Bscheduler_loop%252C%2Bload_schedules%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.worker%2Bimport%2Bensure_group%252C%2Bworker_loop%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%255Cr%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Btest_delayed_job_not_before_run_at_and_scheduler_restart%2528tmp_path%252C%2Bmonkeypatch%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BConfigure%2BDB%2Band%2BRedis%2BURL%2Bfor%2Blocal%2Bdockerized%2BRedis.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdb_path%2B%253D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522jobs.db%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmonkeypatch.setenv%2528%255C%2522MINIQUEUE_DB_URL%255C%2522%252C%2Bf%255C%2522sqlite%2Baiosqlite%253A%252F%252F%252F%257Bdb_path%257D%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmonkeypatch.setenv%2528%255C%2522MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522redis%253A%252F%252Flocalhost%253A6379%252F0%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmonkeypatch.setenv%2528%255C%2522MINIQUEUE_SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SEC%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%25221%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bapp%2B%253D%2Bcreate_app%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Binit_db%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsettings%2B%253D%2Bget_settings%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bensure_group%2528settings.queue_default%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BStart%2Ba%2Bsingle%2Bworker%2Band%2Ba%2Bscheduler%2Bloop.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bstop_event%2B%253D%2Basyncio.Event%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2Bworker_task%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bworker_loop%25280%252C%2Bqueue%253Dsettings.queue_default%252C%2Bconsumer_name%253D%255C%2522test-worker%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfrom%2Bminiqueue.scheduler%2Bimport%2Bload_schedules%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BUse%2Ban%2Bempty%2Bschedule%2Blist%2Bso%2Bonly%2Bdelayed%2Bjobs%2Bare%2Bprocessed.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bschedules%2B%253D%2B%255B%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2Bscheduler_task%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bscheduler_loop%2528schedules%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%
